crs.name: Coordinate Reference System
crs.definition: A coordinate-based system for representing locations on Earth. GeoJSON in this workflow must use EPSG:4326 (WGS 84).

dai.name: Team DAI (within ZDV)
dai.definition: Team within ZDV (Central Data Processing) that develops and maintains the online validator and Open Data Platform components used in this workflow.

epsg4326.name: WGS 84 geographic coordinate system
epsg4326.definition: Standard geographic coordinate reference system (longitude/latitude in decimal degrees). Required CRS when exporting GeoJSON geometries in QGIS for this workflow.

idv.name: Geodata-Desk
idv.definition: KfW Geodata-Desk team. Maintains the PLM, performs aggregation and map creation, and supports geometry-based data preparation.

geojson.name: Geographic JSON
geojson.definition: Open standard file format for encoding geographic features and their properties. Used throughout the workflow for validated project locations and ODP uploads.

gis.name: Geographic Information System
gis.definition: Software for creating, editing, and analysing spatial data. QGIS is used in the Collect step to draw polygon and line geometries.

kfw.name: Kreditanstalt für Wiederaufbau
kfw.definition: German development bank. KfW operations staff (PM/PA) perform visual checks and ODP uploads within this workflow.

mapme.name: MapMe initiative
mapme.definition: Initiative providing the Project Locations Model specification, PLM templates, and the browser-based online validator.

odp.name: Open Data Platform
odp.definition: KfW platform for publishing geospatial data resources and portfolio maps. Validated GeoJSON is uploaded here before aggregation and map creation.

pa.name: Project Assistant
pa.definition: KfW operations role (with PM) responsible for updating project locations, including visual plausibility checks and ODP uploads.

pia.name: PIA / external consultant
pia.definition: External consultant who performs the Collect and Validate steps using the PLM and online validator.

plm.name: Project Locations Model
plm.definition: Excel template (XLSX) for collecting project location metadata. Joined to GeoJSON geometry files for multi-geometry locations or completed with latitude/longitude columns for point locations.

pm.name: Project Manager
pm.definition: KfW operations role (with PA) responsible for project location updates, including visual plausibility checks and ODP uploads.

pmpa.name: Project Manager / Project Assistant
pmpa.definition: KfW operations roles that perform visual plausibility checks and upload validated data to ODP.

qgis.name: QGIS
qgis.definition: Free, open-source GIS desktop application used to create and export GeoJSON geometries for lines and polygons in the Collect step.

wgs84.name: World Geodetic System 1984
wgs84.definition: Global geographic coordinate system (EPSG:4326) required for GeoJSON export in this workflow.

xlsx.name: Excel spreadsheet
xlsx.definition: Microsoft Excel Open XML format. The PLM is provided and completed as an XLSX file.

zdv.name: Zentrale Datenverarbeitung (Central Data Processing)
zdv.definition: KfW unit hosting Team DAI, which maintains the online validator and ODP tools used in Validate, Visual check, Upload, and Create map steps.
